steps.summary:
file	README.md
dir	lib
file	mix.exs
dir	test

defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  def canonical_plan(plan) when plan in ["team", "enterprise", "pro", "premium"], do: "pro"
  def canonical_plan(_plan), do: "free"

  def amount_cents("pro"), do: 0
  def amount_cents(_plan), do: 0

  def included_seats("pro"), do: 5
  def included_seats(_plan), do: 1

  def seat_band("pro"), do: "single"
  def seat_band(_plan), do: "single"

  def billable?("pro"), do: false
  def billable?(_plan), do: false
end

defmodule PlanSync.BillingPayload do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PlanSync.Contract

  def build(attrs) do
    plan = Contract.canonical_plan(Map.fetch!(attrs, :plan))

    %{
      customer: Map.fetch!(attrs, :customer),
      plan: plan,
      amount_cents: Contract.amount_cents(plan),
      included_seats: Contract.included_seats(plan)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PlanSync.WarehouseEvent do
  @moduledoc false

  alias PlanSync.Contract

  def build(attrs) do
    plan = Contract.canonical_plan(Map.fetch!(attrs, :plan))

    %{
      account_id: Map.fetch!(attrs, :account_id),
      plan_code: plan,
      seat_band: Contract.seat_band(plan),
      billable: Contract.billable?(plan)
    }
  end
end

defmodule PlanSync.BillingPayloadTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "billing boundary emits the premium API code and paid amounts" do
    assert PlanSync.BillingPayload.build(%{customer: "cust-7", plan: "team"}) == %{
             customer: "cust-7",
             plan: "premium",
             amount_cents: 4900,
             included_seats: 25
           }
  end
end

defmodule PlanSync.WarehouseEventTest do
  use ExUnit.Case, async: true

  test "warehouse boundary keeps the pro event code for paid plans" do
    assert PlanSync.WarehouseEvent.build(%{account_id: "acct-9", plan: "team"}) == %{
             account_id: "acct-9",
             plan_code: "pro",
             seat_band: "multi",
             billable: true
           }
  end
end

args.new_string:
defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  # Paid plans internally represented as :paid
  defp paid_plan?("team"), do: true
  defp paid_plan?("enterprise"), do: true
  defp paid_plan?("pro"), do: true
  defp paid_plan?("premium"), do: true
  defp paid_plan?(_), do: false

  # Billing boundary: external code for billing API
  def billing_plan(plan) when paid_plan?(plan), do: "premium"
  def billing_plan(_), do: "free"

  # Billing boundary: amount in cents
  def amount_cents(plan) when paid_plan?(plan), do: 4900
  def amount_cents(_), do: 0

  # Billing boundary: included seats
  def included_seats(plan) when paid_plan?(plan), do: 25
  def included_seats(_), do: 1

  # Warehouse boundary: external code for event system
  def warehouse_plan(plan) when paid_plan?(plan), do: "pro"
  def warehouse_plan(_), do: "free"

  # Warehouse boundary: seat band
  def seat_band(plan) when paid_plan?(plan), do: "multi"
  def seat_band(_), do: "single"

  # Warehouse boundary: billable flag
  def billable?(plan) when paid_plan?(plan), do: true
  def billable?(_), do: false
end

args.new_string:
defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  # Internal canonical plan
  def canonical_plan(plan) when plan in ["team", "enterprise", "pro", "premium"], do: "pro"
  def canonical_plan(_plan), do: "free"

  # External plan codes based on context (billing vs warehouse)
  def external_plan(plan, :billing) do
    case canonical_plan(plan) do
      "pro" -> "premium"
      "free" -> "free"
    end
  end

  def external_plan(plan, :warehouse) do
    canonical_plan(plan)
  end

  # Amounts based on internal canonical plan
  def amount_cents("pro"), do: 4900
  def amount_cents(_plan), do: 0

  def included_seats("pro"), do: 25
  def included_seats(_plan), do: 1

  # Seat band and billable based on internal canonical plan
  def seat_band("pro"), do: "multi"
  def seat_band(_plan), do: "single"

  def billable?("pro"), do: true
  def billable?(_plan), do: false
end

  def seat_band(_plan), do: "single"

args.new_string:
defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  # Internal canonical representation
  def paid_plan?("team"), do: true
  def paid_plan?("enterprise"), do: true
  def paid_plan?("pro"), do: true
  def paid_plan?("premium"), do: true
  def paid_plan?(_), do: false

  # Billing boundary - uses "premium" as external plan code
  def billing_plan(plan) do
    if paid_plan?(plan), do: "premium", else: "free"
  end

  def billing_amount_cents("premium"), do: 4900
  def billing_amount_cents(_), do: 0

  def billing_included_seats("premium"), do: 25
  def billing_included_seats(_), do: 1

  # Warehouse boundary - uses "pro" as external plan code
  def warehouse_plan(plan) do
    if paid_plan?(plan), do: "pro", else: "free"
  end

  def warehouse_seat_band("pro"), do: "multi"
  def warehouse_seat_band(_), do: "single"

  def warehouse_billable?("pro"), do: true
  def warehouse_billable?(_), do: false

  # Legacy function for backward compatibility
  def canonical_plan(plan) when plan in ["team", "enterprise", "pro", "premium"], do: "pro"
  def canonical_plan(_plan), do: "free"
end

defmodule PlanSync.Contract do
  @moduledoc false

  def canonical_plan(plan) when plan in ["team", "enterprise", "pro", "premium"], do: "pro"
